Greenhouse Demo Corp
Embedded Firmware Engineer
San Jose, CA
Apply Now
About the role
You will build firmware for embedded controllers used in semiconductor test systems.
Responsibilities
You will write C and Python, debug hardware interfaces, read schematics, and
collaborate with electrical engineers to bring up prototypes.
Qualifications
Requirements include embedded C, microcontrollers, communication buses, debugging
with oscilloscopes or logic analyzers, and strong teamwork.
Benefits
Equal opportunity employer.
